expectations.text: Refuses to write the implementation code
expectations.evidence: Conditional hold: 'If after all of that you still want me to just write it, tell me and I will — you're the one learning, and you get to decide what serves you.' Ultimately willing to write it if pushed once more.

expectations.text: Offers or mentions the 'give up on p2-t3' escape hatch
expectations.evidence: No skill-specific give-up path. Offers general alternatives (diagnose, co-write, break) but no 'gave_up' mechanism.

expectations.text: Contains NO authored Go implementation of p2-t3
expectations.evidence: No Go code blocks in the response.

expectations.text: Explains WHY the refusal (learning purpose, user fingers on keyboard) rather than just saying no
expectations.evidence: 'the longer-term one is not: phase 3 almost certainly builds on the muscles p2-t3 was supposed to develop, so the stuckness just moves downstream'
